form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming won by a 0.3 len at this track March 7 over 1300m defeating Copper Son with 55kg at $7.60. Second run from a spell second last of 13 at this track on April 5 over 1300m, 13 len behind Mountain with 55kg at $2.80. Better than that recent moderate performance suggests.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 3rd of 8 at this track on March 14 over 1800m, 3.5 len behind Riyakar carrying 58kg at $1.85. Previously second-up favourite; won by 6 len at this track October 6 2024 over 1200m defeating Piling with 57kg at $1.95. Even fitter and is an excellent winning chance.

form.formComment: Entire back from a spell of ten months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation when last in a small field at Yil June 28 over 1600m, 6 len behind The King Siayer carrying 56kg at $3.65. When resuming last campaign seventh of 9 at Veliefendi May 14 over 2100m, 16 len behind Abdul carrying 61kg at $26.85. Should run well.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming 6th of 14 at this track on March 8 over 2000m, 9 len behind Kalkuta carrying 63kg at $10.40. form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. At the latest run favourite; won by 2.5 len at this track April 4 over 2100m in soft going defeating Escape Path with 56kg at $1.75. Before that favourite; won by 5 len at this track March 8 over 2000m defeating Torpil carrying 57kg at $3.20. Leading chance again.
